description: Watch simulated market microstructure and produce live liquidity-risk explanations.

fields.description: Comma-separated symbols for the synthetic market stream.
fields.label: Symbols

fields.description: Deterministic seed for repeatable market data.
fields.label: Market seed

init_config_review.instruction: Review market stream, LLM, and alert settings before launching the liquidity radar.

metadata.customizable_for: Equities, crypto, FX, liquidity monitoring, trading operations.
metadata.description: Watch simulated market microstructure and produce live liquidity-risk explanations.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

metadata.llm_agent_role: Signal analyzer, market explainer, advisor agent.
metadata.name: Liquidity Microstructure Radar
metadata.output: Market signals, risk explanations, advice events, and optional Slack alerts.

output_contract.status: sent to stderr as JSON lines
output_contract.stdout: single JSON object or bundle path

metadata.problem_solved: Markets evolve tick by tick; spreads, depth, momentum, and volatility interact faster than static dashboards or one-shot summaries can capture.

quick_test.description: Uses smaller deterministic inputs and local mock providers where external resources are optional.

metadata.simulation_type: Live market stream and exchange-style signal simulation.

standard.execution_model: load_metadata -> resolve_config -> load_inputs -> start_run_store -> observe_simulation_state -> call_llm_agent -> evaluate_workflow_state -> route_by_context -> request_human_input -> apply_decision_to_simulation -> emit_events -> write_final_artifact -> fan_out_output_skills

metadata.target_user: Trading teams, market-risk analysts, and fintech product evaluators.

name: Liquidity Microstructure Radar
